title: SHERIFF'S OFFICE - 211info
text: DESCHUTES COUNTY SHERIFF'S OFFICE SHERIFF'S OFFICE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides law enforcement services that include criminal investigations, public records requests, concealed handgun license (CHL) classes, and firearm licensing. Also provides animal-based services, including animal control, pet shelter information, and additional resources. 63333 W Highway 20 Bend, OR 97703 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm (541) 388-6655 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 388-6655 Non-Emergency (541) 693-6911 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call, walk in, or visit website for more information. Call non-emergency dispatch for animals or livestock. FEES: Varies by service DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Deschutes County Services: Animal Control Firearm Safety Education Sheriff Other Services Offered At This Location: CRIMINAL CORRECTIONAL SYSTEM - JAIL INFORMATION INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - CENTRAL OREGON PARTNERSHIPS FOR YOUTH SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES - DEFLECTION DRUG TREATMENT PROGRAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
